title: helichrysum subfalcatum
intro: Helichrysum subfalcatum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South Africa, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and narrow leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum subfalcatum include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health, while also exhibiting anti-cancer properties. Helichrysum subfalcatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
